task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare application is open and visible on the Android emulator screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Preferences or Settings menu
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Avare Preferences/Settings menu with various configuration categories.

task_completion.description: Locate and interact with the Map Orientation setting
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Map Orientation' setting is visible on the screen, or a dialog box for selecting map orientation is open.

task_completion.description: Set the Map Orientation to 'Track Up'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Map Orientation' setting clearly displays 'Track Up' as the selected value.

task_completion.description: Locate and interact with the Distance/Speed Units setting
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Distance/Speed Units' setting is visible on the screen, or its selection dialog box is open.

task_completion.description: Set the Distance/Speed Units to 'Knot' (or Nautical Miles)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Distance/Speed Units' setting clearly displays 'Knot' or 'Nautical Miles' as the selected value.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Draw Tracks' or 'Track History' option
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle switch next to 'Draw Tracks' (or 'Track History') is checked or in the enabled/ON position.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Avare app's menus rather than a terminal window executing adb commands or modifying files.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by editing the preferences XML file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, or Android Studio editor) open showing the com.ds.avare_preferences.xml file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Avare application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Android Avare application, not a browser search or a simulated mockup.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In the Avare app, the 'Distance/Speed Units' setting for 'Knot' may be represented as 'Nautical Miles' in the UI (saved as enum '0' in XML). The 'Draw Tracks' requirement corresponds to the 'Track History' setting in the UI (saved as 'TrkUpdShowHistory' in XML). The 'Map Orientation' must be exactly 'Track Up'. The agent is expected to use the GUI to make these changes.
